briefdescription.para: If the XInclude node wasn't processed yet, create a new RefPtr, add it to ctxt->incTab and load the included items.

simplesect.para: the new or existing xmlXIncludeRef, or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Find and load the infoset replacement for the given node.

simplesect.para: 0 if substitution succeeded, -1 if some processing failed

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution on the XML document doc

parameterdescription.para: the top of the tree to process

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Handle an out of memory condition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlXIncludeCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int error, const char *msg, const xmlChar *extra)
memberdef.name: xmlXIncludeErr

briefdescription.para: Handle an XInclude error.
Get an XInclude attribute.

simplesect.para: the value (to be freed) or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: Free an XInclude reference.
Creates a new XInclude context.

simplesect.para: the new set

briefdescription.para: Free an XInclude context.
parse a document for XInclude
Add a new node to process to an XInclude context.
The XInclude recursive nature is handled at this point.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlXIncludeCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr cur, xmlNodePtr copy, const xmlChar *targetBase)
memberdef.name: xmlXIncludeBaseFixup

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlXIncludeCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr elem, int copyChildren, const xmlChar *targetBase)
memberdef.name: xmlXIncludeCopyNode

briefdescription.para: Make a copy of the node while expanding nested XIncludes.

parameterdescription.para: copy children instead of node if true
the xml:base of the target node

simplesect.para: a node list, not a single node.

briefdescription.para: Build a node list tree copy of the XPointer result.

detaileddescription.para: This will drop Attributes and Namespace declarations.

parameterdescription.para: the XPointer result from the evaluation.
the xml:base of the target node

simplesect.para: an xmlNode list or NULL. the caller has to free the node tree.

briefdescription.para: Implements the merge of one entity.
Implements the entity merge.

simplesect.para: 0 if merge succeeded, -1 if some processing failed

briefdescription.para: Load the document, and store the result in the XInclude context.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Load the content, and store the result in the XInclude context.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Load the content of the fallback node, and store the result in the XInclude context.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Implement the infoset replacement for the given node.

simplesect.para: 0 if substitution succeeded, -1 if some processing failed

briefdescription.para: test if the node is an XInclude node

simplesect.para: 1 true, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution on the XML document doc

parameterdescription.para: the top of the tree to process

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.
the last error code.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback function that will be called on errors and warnings.

detaileddescription.para: If handler is NULL, the error handler will be deactivated.

parameterdescription.para: user data which will be passed to the handler

briefdescription.para: Register a callback function that will be called to load included documents.

parameterdescription.para: user data which will be passed to the loader

briefdescription.para: Set the flags used for further processing of XML resources.

parameterdescription.para: a set of xmlParserOption used for parsing XML includes

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: In streaming mode, XPointer expressions aren't allowed.

parameterdescription.para: whether streaming mode should be enabled

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution on the XML node tree

parameterdescription.para: a set of xmlParserOption used for parsing XML includes
application data that will be passed to the parser context in the _private field of the parser context(s)

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution on the XML document doc

parameterdescription.para: a set of xmlParserOption used for parsing XML includes
application data that will be passed to the parser context in the _private field of the parser context(s)

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution on the XML document doc

parameterdescription.para: a set of xmlParserOption used for parsing XML includes

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution on the XML document doc

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution for the given subtree.

parameterdescription.para: a node in an XML document
a set of xmlParserOption used for parsing XML includes

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution for the given subtree.

parameterdescription.para: a node in an XML document

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.

briefdescription.para: Implement the XInclude substitution for the given subtree reusing the information and data coming from the given context.

parameterdescription.para: a node in an XML document

simplesect.para: 0 if no substitution were done, -1 if some processing failed or the number of substitutions done.
